mnemonics: All We Have To Decide Is What To Boost
keyPoints: Adaboost: Adding 1/n weighted errors at each round.
Stumping: Combine multiple weak models to create a strong one.
Bagging: Using bagging to reduce overfitting by creating multiple datasets.
Subagging: Combining bagging and boosting to create more robust models.
Random: Randomly combining data to create multiple models.
